name: Keep Rheumatoid Arthritis Patients
remarks: Synthea 'keep module' used with the -k command line flag.
After a patient is fully simulated, Synthea runs this module against the
finished record. The Guard state below only allows the module to reach the
Keep state when the patient has EVER had a Rheumatoid arthritis condition
(SNOMED-CT 69896004, as emitted by Synthea's rheumatoid_arthritis module).
Patients who never satisfy the Guard are discarded and never exported,
yielding an RA-only cohort. Patients whose RA later entered remission are
still kept, because the downstream OMOP analyses define the cohort by
condition occurrence rather than by active status at the end of life.
